privileged_info_summary: Task 'organize_into_subcollections@1' uses 18 synthetically-seeded academic papers (10 classic papers + 8 ML papers from seed_library.py). The 6 target papers for organization are all verified real papers: (1) 'Attention Is All You Need' (Vaswani et al., NeurIPS 2017), (2) 'BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding' (Devlin et al., NAACL 2019), (3) 'Language Models are Few-Shot Learners' (Brown et al., NeurIPS 2020), (4) 'ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks' (Krizhevsky et al., NIPS 2012, AlexNet), (5) 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition' (He et al., CVPR 2016, ResNet), (6) 'Generative Adversarial Nets' (Goodfellow et al., NeurIPS 2014). Required collection structure: top-level 'Deep Learning Survey' with two subcollections ('NLP Papers' and 'Vision Papers'). All paper titles, authors, and publication years are verified against published sources.
